metadata.description: Integration Service API Workflow representing the UiPath Healthcare Agentic Solution 'Prior Authorization Continuity'. Maintains prior-authorization continuity (evidence gathering, medical-necessity validation) while payment systems are disrupted. Consumed by the Stakeholder-Parent Impact Assessment stage. Shapes a deterministic synthetic continuity payload (pending_auth_count, continuity_risk, expedited_queue, sla_breach_projection) from workflow inputs by a JavaScript/Assign activity. DEPLOY-TIME NOTE: Data Fabric refs (qem:Provider[slug=...]) resolve at deploy via 'uip api-workflow registry stub' against a live tenant; the connector read is NOT hand-authored here.

script.code: var day = $workflow.input.simulated_day; var slug = $workflow.input.provider_slug; var pending = 120 + (day * 7); var risk = day >= 45 ? 'critical' : (day >= 14 ? 'elevated' : 'stable'); var queue = [{ auth_id: slug + '-PA-1001', service_line: 'oncology-infusion', priority: 'expedited', medical_necessity: 'validated' }, { auth_id: slug + '-PA-1002', service_line: 'cardiac-imaging', priority: 'expedited', medical_necessity: 'evidence-pending' }, { auth_id: slug + '-PA-1003', service_line: 'inpatient-surgical', priority: 'expedited', medical_necessity: 'validated' }]; var breachDay = day + 9; var projection = 'projected SLA breach on simulated_day ' + breachDay + ' for ' + slug + ' prior-auth backlog'; return { pending_auth_count: pending, continuity_risk: risk, expedited_queue: queue, sla_breach_projection: projection };
